---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an Emberlane feature or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Use Case

What are you trying to do?

## Scope

Does this apply to local mode, AWS mode, MCP, Terraform, or a future cloud backend?

## Model Or Runtime

Which model, runtime, or endpoint is involved?

## Current Limitation

Why do the existing commands not solve this?

## Proposed Behavior

What would the ideal Emberlane command, API, or config look like?

## Notes

Please avoid requesting unrelated cloud providers, dashboards, workflow engines, or full RAG systems unless you can explain why they belong in Emberlane core.
